name: workflow transition rejects a transition that is not allowed from the current state
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf '{"current_state":"merge","history":[]}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/workflow-state.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/workflow/transition.sh" --to plan --state-file .claude-tdd-pro/workflow-state.json 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'invalid_transition' err.txt && grep -q 'from=merge to=plan' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
